request.description:
## POST `/sheet/set`

Creates or updates a spreadsheet cell.

This endpoint supports:

\- Storing direct numeric values  
\- Storing formulas  
\- Automatic formula evaluation  
\- Dependency tracking  
\- Auto-recalculation of dependent cells

\---

### Set a direct value


{
  "cell": "A1",
  "value": 10
}

### Set a formula


{
  "cell": "C1",
  "formula": "=A1+B1"
}



Formula is parsed using:

Tokenization  
Shunting Yard Algorithm  
Reverse Polish Notation (RPN)

### Auto Recalculation

If dependent formulas exist:  
C1 = =A1+B1  
D1 = =C1\*2

and then updating cell "A1"  
Automatically updates: C1 and D1.  
This is handled using a dependency graph and DFS traversal.

Either value or formula must be provided.

response:

{
  "message": "Cell updated successfully"
}

item.name: Get value of cell ( evaluating the formula)

request.description:
# By this we can find value of any cell

> this will first do the tokenizations and then use the stack based formula evaluator to evaluate the fomrula. 
  

### **How to use this endpoint ?**

we have to pass as {formula : "A1+10"} to find value of cell A1 + 10.

- A1+10
    
- A2+A3
    
- (A1+B2)\*C3
    
- 10\*3 + 5 \*C1 and so on
